use_cases: Monitoring and visualizing incident metrics across different time periods with normalized stacked area charts
Comparing incident trends and percentage changes with animated CountUp statistics and trend indicators
Displaying multi-series incident data with interactive time period filtering for operational analytics
Dashboard analytics for DevOps and SRE teams tracking system reliability metrics
Real-time incident reporting with visual trend analysis for SaaS operations teams
ai_summary: An advanced incident reporting dashboard featuring a stacked normalized area chart from the reaviz library, paired with animated statistics and trend indicators. Includes time period filtering, legend controls, and detailed metric breakdowns with CountUp animations. Designed for monitoring operational incidents and system reliability metrics in SaaS and DevOps environments.
